name: aristosolve
description: AI-guided problem solving platform backend API

scripts.seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {sequelize}=require('./models/index'); const u=require('./seeders/01-users'); const p=require('./seeders/02-problems'); const a=require('./seeders/03-admins'); const qi=sequelize.getQueryInterface(); sequelize.sync({force:false}).then(()=>u.up(qi)).then(()=>p.up(qi)).then(()=>a.up(qi)).then(()=>{console.log('Done. Database aristosolve created with all tables and seed data.');process.exit(0)}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)});"
